_comment: Reproduces Table 4 (tab:cal-comparison): calibration × crowd/emp ablation on FB A∪B. ZS rows now use the Halawi prompt for ALL crowd/emp settings (matches the paper's claim that ZS uses Halawi). The non-halawi pro-high-none-c0-t0 row used in the original paper version mixed prompts across cells; switching to -halawi gives a consistent baseline that also more faithfully emulates the external 'Gemini-3-Pro-Preview (zero shot with crowd forecast)' method on the FB leaderboard. Adds a ZS (c1,e0) row to isolate the crowd contribution under ZS.
